singapore-court-legal.title: MikeROS — Singapore Rules of Court 2021
singapore-court-legal.description: Singapore civil court procedure (Rules of Court 2021): grounded answers citing governing rules, operator-verified case authorities where they attach, verified reasoning chains. Read-only. API-key auth (CONNECTORS.md-accepted): supply your operator-issued MikeROS API key at connect time as 'Authorization: Bearer <key>'.
